query: SELECT d.id as dialogId, COUNT(m.id) as msgCount FROM dialogs d LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.dialogId = d.id WHERE d.telegramAccountId = 150002 GROUP BY d.id HAVING msgCount > 0 LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LPssBLFuVbNm9U.root --database bdpiDWPftxaP5joCkvKLNw --execute SELECT d.id as dialogId, COUNT(m.id) as msgCount FROM dialogs d LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.dialogId = d.id WHERE d.telegramAccountId = 150002 GROUP BY d.id HAVING msgCount > 0 LIMIT 10;
